cases.description: Built New Tab smoke gate at the audited desktop baseline
setup: Launch a dedicated empty Chrome profile with the production extension build loaded.
Use an English browser locale and leave the clean profile at its default light theme and 100% tab zoom.
Open a New Tab once to activate the extension worker; do not add sync credentials or fixture data.
cleanup: Close the generated audit target and delete the disposable Chrome profile after evidence is collected.

cases.description: First-use guidance and unavailable Stow hierarchy in English light mode
setup: Open the production New Tab in a disposable empty profile without saved windows or ordinary web tabs.
cleanup: Close the generated audit target and discard the disposable profile.

cases.description: First-use guidance and unavailable Stow hierarchy in Simplified Chinese dark mode
setup: Open the production New Tab in a disposable empty profile and switch to Simplified Chinese dark mode through production controls.
cleanup: Close the generated audit target and discard the disposable profile.

cases.description: No action feedback leaves no empty row above the New Tab workspace
setup: Open the production New Tab in a disposable profile without inserting an action-feedback fixture.
cleanup: Close the generated audit target and discard the disposable profile.

cases.description: One-line Stow feedback stays above the New Tab workspace
setup: Insert the audit-only Stow success fixture after the production New Tab renders; App tests cover the real action wiring.
cleanup: Close the generated audit target and discard the disposable profile.

cases.description: One-line Restore feedback stays above the New Tab workspace at the tablet breakpoint
setup: Insert the audit-only Restore success fixture after the production New Tab renders; App tests cover the real action wiring.
cleanup: Close the generated audit target and discard the disposable profile.

cases.description: Long action error wraps inside the narrow viewport and stays above the New Tab workspace
setup: Insert the audit-only long error fixture after the production New Tab renders to isolate production layout geometry.
cleanup: Close the generated audit target and discard the disposable profile.

cases.description: Desktop Tab order and nested modal isolation follow the production New Tab interaction model
setup: Use the real empty production New Tab to traverse focus, open and close the Quick Link form, then open Extra and its nested Add todo form.
cleanup: Close the generated audit target and discard the disposable profile.

cases.description: Narrow Tab order and nested modal isolation follow the production New Tab interaction model
setup: Use the real empty production New Tab to traverse focus, open and close the Quick Link form, then open Extra and its nested Add todo form.
cleanup: Close the generated audit target and discard the disposable profile.

cases.description: Long New Tab collections retain independent region scrolling at the desktop width
setup: Insert audit-only long collection rows after the production New Tab renders to exercise the real scroll containers.
cleanup: Close the generated audit target and discard the disposable profile.

cases.description: Representative New Tab collections retain the fixed shell at the desktop boundary
setup: Insert audit-only representative collection rows after the production New Tab renders and select the requested production theme and language controls.
cleanup: Close the generated audit target and discard the disposable profile.

cases.description: Long New Tab collections use a sticky rail and document-owned stacked workspace scrolling
setup: Insert audit-only long collection rows after the production New Tab renders to exercise tablet rail and document scroll ownership.
cleanup: Close the generated audit target and discard the disposable profile.

cases.description: Long narrow New Tab collections use one reachable document flow without hiding controls
setup: Insert audit-only long collection rows after the production New Tab renders and select the requested production theme and language controls.
cleanup: Close the generated audit target and discard the disposable profile.

cases.description: A 200 percent zoomed New Tab uses the effective narrow viewport and keeps long content reachable
setup: Set the production extension tab to 200 percent zoom and insert audit-only long collection rows after the New Tab renders.
cleanup: Close the generated audit target and discard the disposable profile.

cases.description: The desktop New Tab retains its V2 structure while consuming the reviewed shared semantic tokens
setup: Cycle the production page through no theme attribute, explicit light, and explicit dark without writing theme storage.
cleanup: Close the generated audit target and discard the disposable profile.

cases.description: The narrow New Tab retains its V2 structure while consuming the reviewed shared semantic tokens
setup: Cycle the production page through no theme attribute, explicit light, and explicit dark without writing theme storage.
cleanup: Close the generated audit target and discard the disposable profile.

cleanup: Close the generated audit target and discard the disposable profile.
